insight: ChatControl's Discord integration requires the DiscordSRV plugin. Users must disable DiscordSRV's built-in chat relay by setting `DiscordChatChannelMinecraftToDiscord: false` in DiscordSRV's `config.yml`, otherwise messages get duplicated. ChatControl checks this on startup and logs a warning if it's still enabled (see ChatControl.java line ~247).

When mixing legacy ampersand codes (`&f`, `&l`, `&r`) inside MiniMessage tag parameters (e.g., hover text in `<hover:show_text:"...">`), `&r` may not properly reset decorations like bold. Users should use MiniMessage closing tags (`</bold>`, `</italic>`) or `<reset>` instead of `&r` inside hover/click tag content. This also applies to the proxy.yml Prefix, which supports MiniMessage via `SimpleComponent.fromMiniAmpersand()`.
